title: I Lead from Full
subtitle: An affirmation for naming the abundant leader as a present-tense identity, already operative, not a future destination
excerpt: A brief affirmation from the Day 81 theme of a 12-week money programme. The statement names leading from full as the current operating principle, not an aspiration.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 81 affirmation in MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796).

practice.whenToUse: Use before making a decision, entering a difficult conversation, or starting a day where you want to bring a full, generous presence rather than a guarded one.

content.text: A brief affirmation from the Day 81 theme of a 12-week money programme. Day 81: see yourself as an abundant leader. The statement names a single fact about the quality of every decision you make today.
Say it three times in the morning. Let it settle before you move into the day.
I am an abundant leader. I lead from full.
Adapted from the Day 81 affirmation in MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
